auth_notes: Requires a Google Cloud Console project with Gmail API enabled. Must configure OAuth consent screen and create credentials to obtain Client ID and Client Secret. Specific scopes like 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.modify' are typically required.
rate_limits: 1,000,000,000 quota units per day per project; 250 quota units per user per second (per-method costs vary, e.g., 'get' is 5 units).
gotchas: OAuth2 tokens expire every 7 days if the Google Cloud Project is in 'Testing' mode; must set to 'Production' for long-term use.
Voicemails are typically received as attachments; n8n requires a separate 'Gmail: Get Attachment' operation to process the audio file.
Gmail Push notifications (webhooks) require Google Cloud Pub/Sub setup, which is more complex than standard polling.
client_must_provide: OAuth Client ID and Client Secret
Specific email filters or labels used by the voicemail provider
research_notes: Voicemail integration via Gmail assumes the user is receiving voicemail-to-email notifications (common with Google Voice, Vonage, or PBX systems). The workflow usually involves filtering for these emails and downloading the audio attachment for transcription or storage.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Voicemail integration via Gmail assumes the user is receiving voicemail-to-email notifications (common with Google Voice, Vonage, or PBX systems). The workflow usually involves filtering for these emails and downloading the audio attachment for transcription or storage.
